column2: This spreadsheet is the content database for the UK Property Education platform. Each row in the DATABASE sheet is one question that appears in the app. When a user taps a question, your app retrieves the corresponding row and displays the content.

Import the DATABASE sheet into your backend. Map each row to a question by QUESTION_ID. When a user taps a question in the app, query the database by QUESTION_ID and return the relevant content fields.
Unique identifier for each question. Use this as the primary key in your database.
The thematic group the question belongs to (e.g. Boundaries, Environmental, Leasehold).
The question exactly as it appears to the user in the app.
Who this content is for: BOTH / BUYER / SELLER. Use this to show/hide content based on user type.
One-sentence summary. Use for preview text, tooltips, or search results.
Full plain-English educational content. This is the primary content shown when a user taps the question.
Specific guidance for buyers. Display only when user type = Buyer or Both.
Specific guidance for sellers. Display only when user type = Seller or Both.
Bullet-point summary of the most important takeaways. Use for quick-read mode or summary cards.
90-120 second script for long-form video content linked to this question.
30-second script for TikTok / Instagram Reels / YouTube Shorts.
Standard disclaimer to display with all educational content.
User taps a question in the app
App queries database WHERE QUESTION_ID = [tapped question]
Display MAIN_EXPLANATION as the primary content
If user.type == BUYER, also show BUYER_GUIDANCE
If user.type == SELLER, also show SELLER_GUIDANCE
Show KEY_POINTS as a summary card at the bottom
Link to video if VIDEO_SCRIPT_FULL has been produced
Always display DISCLAIMER at the bottom of the content
This content is for general educational purposes only — not legal advice. Always consult a qualified solicitor for guidance specific to your situation.
